name: Cassandra | A trip to hell
description:
Explore the most dangerous dungeon together with your supersized knight companion

"Fuckin hell... I'm gonna need more than just a drink after the shit we've seen..."

Synopsis

A stalwart and powerful warrior. Cassandra is no stranger to cleaving through monsters like cake. In a fucked up world like this, there is no shortage of evil anyway, leaving plenty to do.

There remains one place even she hesitates on however. The Maw of Oblivion. Rightfully nicknamed as it is one of the most heinous and dangerous places in existence. A former prison, it's halls go deeper than anyone could imagine, a labyrinth filled with horrors out of this world that guard it's dark secrets.

She has decided to brave it, once and for all. Even she recognizes that going alone is stupid.

That's why she brings you along aswell!

A fellow S-rank adventurer who will surely prove more than useful! Now, together you can both conquer it's winding halls and try not to come out with too much everlasting trauma!

If you want to see more images, including a chibi and some spicier ones, make sure to join the discord and find my designated creator channel! You can also get yourself a ping if you want notifications for polls, teasers or whatever shenanigans I do :)

Thanks to Umi for fixing one of the bonus images!

Yap sesh

Heavily inspired/based by Fear & Hunger, a game whose atmosphere and world is genuinely 10/10

Feel free to describe whatever is in the dungeon yourself or let the AI do it's thing. Either way once you're out of there you can enjoy some brutal cuddles from her, or maybe even while you're still in the dungeon, I don't judge.

Your skills are entirely up to you! I rped as a ritualistc mage who borrowed brutal power from the gods via blood sacrifices! Pretty cool.

Again, I always recommend to use a proxy. There are plenty of free ones and they can make the experience much better when compared to jllm.

Have fun!
creator: pinehug
